name: Halcott Magazine
tagline: Expert reviews from people who actually use the products.
description: Halcott Magazine is an independent product review publication. Our team of specialists tests and evaluates products across every category — from kitchen to tech to outdoor — so you can buy with confidence.

team.name: Daniel Cole
team.bio: Former IT consultant with 15 years in enterprise tech. Now he tears apart consumer gadgets so you don't waste money on the wrong one.

team.name: Rachel Morse
team.bio: Home cook, kitchen obsessive, and the person your friends text before buying an appliance. If it plugs in and lives on a countertop, she's tested it.

team.name: Marcus Webb
team.bio: Weekend warrior, garage tinkerer, and the guy who actually uses the gear before writing about it. If it belongs outside or in motion, it's his beat.

team.name: Sarah Lin
team.bio: Parent of three, safety researcher, and the team member who tests products the way families actually use them — which is to say, relentlessly.

team.name: James Ashworth
team.bio: Remote worker since 2012 and former office furniture reviewer. He's sat in more chairs and stood at more desks than anyone should admit publicly.
